appraisal_events.evidence: « Eux s'étonnaient, et de fait, Swann n'était plus le même. On ne recevait plus jamais de lettre de lui… Il s'abstenait d'aller dans les endroits où on en rencontre… “Il est très tenu, il y a certainement une femme qui le force…” »
appraisal_events.explanation: Society observes that Swann has withdrawn from his habitual social pursuits and is ‘tenu’ by a woman, which locally lowers his social standing and independence.

status_effects.explanation: Swann appears socially diminished and less autonomous as observers see him as constrained by an affair and absent from his usual circles.
